sentences.translationEn: Programming is the language of the future.

sentences.arabic: يَتَعَلَّمُ الْأَطْفَالُ فِي مَدَارِسَ كَثِيرَةٍ كَيْفِيَّةَ كِتَابَةِ رُمُوزٍ بَسِيطَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Djeca u mnogim školama uče kako pisati jednostavne kodove.
sentences.translationEn: Children in many schools learn how to write simple codes.

sentences.arabic: هَذِهِ الْمَهَارَةُ تُسَاعِدُهُمْ عَلَى التَّفْكِيرِ الْمَنْطِقِيِّ وَصِنَاعَةِ تَطْبِيقَاتٍ جَدِيدَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Ova vještina im pomaže u logičkom razmišljanju i pravljenju novih aplikacija.
sentences.translationEn: This skill helps them in logical thinking and creating new applications.
